name: observability-contract-error-emitted
description: Standalone `contract-error-emitted` observability row. Every `_ggui:contract-error` envelope the server emits on the live channel MUST be mirrored as a `contract-error-emitted` observability event for host-side inspection without requiring the host to parse live-channel frames. Asserts the mirror-emission contract directly on the observability envelope.
